body.notes: Participation in IETF meetings constitutes agreement to the Note Well, which permits recording, transcription, and public archival of proceedings. See also BCP 78 (RFC 5378) and BCP 79 (RFC 8179) for IPR policies.

body.title: A method for delivery of SMTP messages over Bundle Protocol networks.
Delay-Tolerant Networking UDP Convergence Layer Protocol Version 2
Bundle Protocol (BP) Secure Advertisement and Neighborhood Discovery (SAND)
Forward Error Correction for the Bundle Transfer Protocol
Lightweight Bundle Protocol Edge Node with Zero-Configuration and Zero-State
Constrained Application Protocol (CoAP) over Bundle Protocol (BP)
DTNMA Application Management Model (AMM) and Data Models
DTNMA Application Data Model (ADM) YANG Syntax
Custody Transfer and Compressed Bundle Status Reporting
Key Establishment in the Space Environment
